memoryArtifacts.headline: HAMPDEN, Edmund (d.1419/20), of Great Hampden, Bucks.
memoryArtifacts.description:
Biography
Edmund’s family, which took its name from Great Hampden, traced its ancestry back to before the Conquest. The manor of Great Hampden, along with other property in Buckinghamshire came to him …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Hampden於大約1340年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Hampden34歲，母親Joan d' Alesbury30歲。他於大約1395年與Joan Belknap在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1420年4月29日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 哈普登享年81歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 哈普登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Hampden于大约1340年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Hampden34岁，母亲Joan d' Alesbury30岁。他于大约1395年与Joan Belknap在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1420年4月29日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾格亞特 哈普登享年81岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾格亞特 哈普登。

nameMeanings.name: Hampden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great or Little Hampden (Bucks).

variants.name: Hamden
meanings: English (Kent and Berkshire): habitational name from Hamden in Smarden, Kent, or from Great or Little Hampden in Buckinghamshire.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Hampden was born about 1340, in England, his father, Sir John Hampden, was 34 and his mother, Joan d' Alesbury, was 30. He married Joan Belknap about 1395, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 April 1420, in Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Hampden est né environ 1340, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hampden, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan d' Alesbury, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joan Belknap environ 1395, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1420, à Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. April 1420 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Hampden è nato il circa 1340 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Hampden, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan d' Alesbury, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Joan Belknap circa 1395, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 aprile 1420, nel Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Hampdenが約1340年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Hampdenは34歳，母Joan d' Alesburyは30歳であった。約1395年にイギリスでJoan Belknapと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1420年4月29日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ハンプデンで81歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ハンプデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Hampden(이)가 대략 1340년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hampden(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan d' Alesbury(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1395년 영국에서 Joan Belknap(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 4월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 함p든에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 그리트 함p든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Hampden nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hampden, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan d' Alesbury, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Belknap aproximadamente 1395, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1420, em Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Hampden родился около 1340 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hampden было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan d' Alesbury, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Belknap около 1395 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 апреля 1420 г. в местности грит хампден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности грит хампден, буккингхамшир, Англия.
